allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); print\(f'intent={d[\\"intent\\"]} conf={d[\\"confidence\\"]} used={d[\\"used\\"]}'\)")

Bash(sqlite3 data/ubongo.db 'SELECT active_persona, auto_mode FROM sessions')
Bash(echo "session: $\(sqlite3 data/ubongo.db 'SELECT active_persona, auto_mode FROM sessions'\)")
Bash(echo "governance_decisions count: $\(sqlite3 data/ubongo.db 'SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM governance_decisions'\)")
Bash(echo "last workflow.agents: $\(sqlite3 data/ubongo.db "SELECT json_extract\(workflow,'\\$.agents'\) FROM workflow_runs ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1"\)")
Bash(echo "workflow.agents: $\(sqlite3 data/ubongo.db "SELECT json_extract\(workflow,'\\$.agents'\) FROM workflow_runs ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1"\)")
Bash(sqlite3 data/ubongo.db "SELECT json_extract\(workflow,'\\$.execution_mode'\) FROM workflow_runs ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;")
Bash(sqlite3 -column data/ubongo.db "SELECT agent, started_at FROM agent_runs WHERE workflow_run_id=\(SELECT MAX\(id\) FROM workflow_runs\) ORDER BY id;")
Bash(sqlite3 -column data/ubongo.db "SELECT agent, confidence FROM agent_runs WHERE workflow_run_id=\(SELECT MAX\(id\) FROM workflow_runs\) ORDER BY id;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/ubongo.db "SELECT json_extract\(output,'\\$.winner'\) FROM agent_runs WHERE agent='evaluator' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;")
Bash(echo "winner: $\(sqlite3 data/ubongo.db "SELECT json_extract\(output,'\\$.winner'\) FROM agent_runs WHERE agent='evaluator' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;"\)")
Bash(sqlite3 data/ubongo.db "SELECT content FROM messages WHERE role='assistant' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/ubongo.db "SELECT agent, outcome FROM agent_runs WHERE workflow_run_id=\(SELECT MAX\(id\) FROM workflow_runs\) ORDER BY id;")
Bash(sqlite3 -column data/ubongo.db "SELECT id, json_extract\(workflow,'\\$.execution_mode'\) FROM workflow_runs ORDER BY id;")
Bash(sqlite3 -column data/ubongo.db "SELECT action, reversibility FROM governance_decisions ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;")

Bash(sqlite3 data/ubongo.db "SELECT action, approval_response FROM governance_decisions;")
